Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs Michael Ohayon, Sage Creek Ranch, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted. Defendant has not waived the right to assert his privilege against self-incrimination as to testimonial evidence. The court does not determine through this ruling whether the privilege may be asserted as to any documents subject to Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One. Defendant is ordered to respond and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
John Lofton; Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Michael Ohayon
John F. Penrose,Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: Davdi Papera

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs Michael Ohayon, Sage Creek Ranch, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant's Deposition Testimony And Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Form Interrogatories is granted as to the Form Interrogatories. Defendant has not waived the right to assert his privilege against self-incrimination as to testimonial evidence. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. The court's ruling as to Defendant's deposition testimony is deferred until the hearing on Defendant's Motion For Stay Of Discovery. The parties are advised that any claim of privilege must be asserted in response to specific questions, and a stay of all discovery is not likely to be granted in the absence of a stay of all proceedings by the Presiding Judge or the Law and Motion Department. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. = (612/EAH)

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs Michael Ohayon, Sage Creek Ranch's Motion To Compel Defendant David Papera's Deposition Testimony And Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Form Interrogatories is granted.
